name: common-electron-app
description: A spec-driven desktop-app team — CEO orchestrator + 10 specialized agents + 10 skills tuned for cross-platform Electron apps. Drives Specify → Design → Plan/Tasks → Implement → Verify with a developer→tester→reviewer sprint loop. Includes packaging, signing, notarization, and auto-update. Mutually exclusive with common-web-app at the same scope (shared agent names).
author: Yaroslav P
